chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-16 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.265/2026. 3. For orders on M.A No.4123/2017. 4. For orders on M.A No.9114/2011. 5. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2026 Mr. Ajay Kumar, advocate for the petitioners. = Learned counsel for the petitioners has filed statement alongwith copies of judgments passed by two courts below which are taken on record. This is old matter filed in the year 2011 and pending since then. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel states that he would be satisfied if the petitioners are allowed to agitate their grievances with respect to the dismissal of their application under Order VI Rule 4 and 5 r/w section 151 C.P.C in Civil Revision Application No.345/2024 which is pending adjudication before this court wherein the judgments dated 11.01.2021 and 24.08.2021 have been assailed whereby the suit filed by the petitioners was dismissed. Order accordingly. In view of above, the petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications; however, with permission to the petitioners to agitate their argument in Civil Revision Application No.345/2024 which would be decided on its own merits strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE *Faisal *
